patterns_recognized: Extreme f5_full_delta (>0.25) + stacked pipeline flags + SP edge AGAINST pick = OVERRIDE to F5-favored side; DET@NYM 05-12 was 10-2 with delta=0.3285, today's 0.2931 is nearly identical and all conditions repeat.

HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) is 4-for-5 validated; single miss (NYY@BAL 05-12) was a direction-agree case where only magnitude differed — enforce without exception when model and market disagree on direction.
Three-signal GOLD CONFIRM bar (F3>500 + edge>4pp + f5_full_delta<0.15 + no stacked flags) is 3-for-3 in archive; PHI@BOS today meets all conditions cleanly.
F1_xera_gap* (asterisk = small sample) as sole F-signal is unreliable; HARD CAP 5 requires PQI or F2/F3 backup — PHI@BOS satisfies this via PQI confirmation.

SEA@HOU prior OVERRIDEs (05-11 Kirby, 05-12 Woo) required confirmed elite OPPOSING SP; today F1_xera_gap=2.51 AGREES with HOU pick (HOU SP rated better), so the override condition is not met — HARD CAP 6 SKIP stands.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: F3=3579.3 (slate's largest swing-take gap) is a genuine directional signal for PIT. Fair_prob missing — Odds API did not fire — correctly caps grade at C and zeroes stake per market-validation requirement. No fair_prob means no edge anchor. PIT's home lineup concentration 0.97 (ultra-balanced) is a structural positive. Cannot elevate beyond SKIP without market anchor; C grade is correct.

WSH barely favored at 50.89% with zero structural support. CIN home with SP advantage provides no directional conviction for WSH. SKIP is the only sound tier.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: OVERRIDE to NYM. f5_full_delta=0.2931 nearly matches the 05-12 DET@NYM record (0.3285) that produced a 10-2 OVERRIDE win. NYM wins F5 at 75.4% (f5_prob=0.754). Two stacked flags: acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True. SP edge 0.99 xERA AGAINST DET; PQI AGAINST DET (Δ=+17.1). Market prices DET at only 46.09%. Direct 05-12 analogy validates OVERRIDE — all four conditions converge.

MIA @ MIN.reasoning: Both probable pitchers — Zebby Matthews and Braxton Garrett — have 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date per the model. Without SP quality scores no directional pick is possible. Prior postgames (05-10, 05-12) confirm PENDING is correct when SP data is absent. No stake warranted.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: No active F-signals. Fair_prob missing, no edge computed. PQI against SD pick (Δ=+3.4). MIL home with C grade and zero computed edge. SD lineup concentration 1.011 (near-perfectly balanced) is modest positive but insufficient for a zero-signal pick. f5_full_delta=0.1092 moderate with no elevation of conviction. SKIP is correct.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 correctly fires at edge=+48.11pp (calibrator hallucination, validated 3-for-3 in archive). F1_xera_gap=2.51 AGREES with HOU pick (+2 SP edge credit) — today HOU's starter is rated better than SEA's, reversing the Kirby/Woo context from 05-11/05-12. Prior OVERRIDE conditions required confirmed elite OPPOSING SP; that condition is not met today. fair_prob=0.1693 is likely a data-quality anomaly, not a real market signal at 17%. SKIP stands per HARD CAP 6; no OVERRIDE warranted with HOU holding the SP advantage.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: Edge=+3.79pp falls just below the 4pp band minimum — correctly excluded. D grade (-2): SP edge 1.71 xERA against STL (OAK starter projected better), PQI against STL (Δ=+23.2). OAK wins F5 at 56.05%, STL barely picked at 50.93% full. Market has STL at 47.14%. Borderline coin-flip with negative structural signals; SKIP is correct.

Edge=+5.6pp within [4,15]pp band. f5_full_delta=0.1189 below the 0.15 concern threshold. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0109 slight PHI bullpen advantage. No stacked flags, confidence_downgrade=False. Three-signal GOLD bar met; B+ grade with positive edge warrants CONFIRM.

ATL direction likely correct per market consensus but no staking edge exists at -12.86pp. CONFIRM the C-grade SKIP.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires: edge=-5.67pp (market prices KC at 56.55%, model at 50.88%), demoting pre-cap A- to B-. f5_full_delta=0.2433 is large — KC dominates F5 at 75.21% via KC SP advantage (F1=2.97, F3=2313.3) but full-game barely 50.88%, requiring CHW bullpen collapse. PQI strongly favors KC (Δ=-28.9) but negative edge prevents GOLD staking. SKIP for staking purposes; direction mildly favors KC.

OVERRIDE conditions not met: no stacked pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=False, no acute_roster), market agrees LAD winning at fair_prob=0.638.
